releases.name: Official Chromium Snapshot 152 (Windows x64)
limitations: Chromium snapshots are best-effort builds from arbitrary source revisions and do not necessarily map to user-facing stable Chrome releases.
Reviewed status applies only to this exact revision, Windows amd64 archive, extracted package tree, executable identity, and recorded Evidence chain.
The snapshot archive does not include a standalone license file; installation requires an explicit Chromium and third-party notice acknowledgement and Veilium does not bundle the archive.
Stock Chromium advanced fingerprint overrides remain unsupported unless the exact capability is separately demonstrated.
